headline: KeyBank Named Honoree of The Civic 50 for the Thirteenth Consecutive Year
summary: Key continues to distinguish itself as one of few companies to achieve consistent high performance throughout the program's 14-year history, underscoring its long-standing leadership in community investment, volunteerism, and measurable social impact ...

headline: TD Cowen Reiterates Buy on KeyCorp, Maintains $68 Price Target
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Aaron Macneil   reiterates KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Buy and maintains $68 price target.
